title: Struggle Detection Script

patterns_implemented.name: circular_error
patterns_implemented.description: Same error appears 3+ times in DEBUG_LOG.jsonl

patterns_implemented.name: stalled_progress
patterns_implemented.description: Progress % unchanged across multiple SESSION_STATE updates

patterns_implemented.name: repeated_hypothesis
patterns_implemented.description: Same fix hypothesis tried multiple times without success

notes_for_orchestrator: Script integrates with debug_logger.py's DEBUG_LOG.jsonl format and session_state_manager.py's SESSION_STATE.md format. The stalled_progress detection relies on heuristics (progress % at 0 with activity) rather than actual git history tracking - this could be enhanced in future. The revert_cycles detection looks for 'revert' keyword in commit messages but doesn't do sophisticated apply-revert-apply sequence analysis yet. Core patterns (circular_error, repeated_hypothesis) are robust and tested.
